---
title: "Andrew Zah"
image: ./about.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: email
      href: 'mailto:chat@andrewzah.com'
    - icon: github
      text: github
      href: 'https://github.com/andrewzah'
    - icon: cloud
      text: bluesky
      href: 'https://bsky.app/profile/dragonsdream.scfgc.org'
    - icon: linkedin
      text: linkedin
      href: 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrewzah/'
    #- icon: mastodon
    #  text: mastodon
    #  href: 'https://fosstodon.org/@andrewzah'
---

> Quoteblock test.
>
> -Andrew

Andrew is currently working for Open Source Systems and AnalyticsHQ.
